name: Housing Instability Z Codes
description: ICD-10-CM Z codes for housing instability, homelessness, and inadequate housing. Used in social needs screening and intervention (SNS-E) measure and SDOH-related quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Housing instability, housed, with risk of homelessness
Other problems related to housing and economic circumstances
Housing instability, housed, in a shelter
Housing instability, housed, homelessness in past 12 months
Problem related to housing and economic circumstances, unspecified
